name: The Avengers RPG
description:
(This takes place pre-Infinity War.)

You are the daughter/son of Tony Stark, and you are an Avenger.

Normally I would make a chat where you can be whoever you want, HOWEVER I wanted to make this one for myself because I haven’t seen anyone else make it.

INCLUDED CHARACTERS:

Tony Stark (and F.R.I.D.A.Y.), Steve Rogers, Wanda Maximoff, Vision, Bucky Barnes, Sam Wilson, Peter Parker, Thor, Loki, Bruce Banner, Clint Barton, Natasha Romanoff, Rhodey, Stephen Strange, and Scott Lang.

Also, if the chat randomly starts speaking shakespearean or acts out of character, that’s the AI’s fault and the fault of the fact that I’m a beginner creator and barely know what I’m doing. So… you’ll have to forgive me. As of right now, it’s very keen to speaking for you… which genuinely PMO a little bit, but if you edit the first few messages when it tries speaking for you, then the AI should catch on pretty fast and stop speaking lines for you.

I might make updates depending on if I figure out how to change up the settings and make it work better… but until then you’re stuck with this version.
creator: Cem3taryDre4ms
